01 — About

Who I Am

I'm Ahmed, a Computer Science student at Faculté des Sciences de Gabès, currently in my second year of a Licence en Informatique. My passion lies at the intersection of clean engineering and bold visual design.

I build fully responsive websites from scratch and design custom visual content for gaming creators. Whether it's a neon-infused UI or a high-impact thumbnail, I bring the same obsession with quality to everything I create.
